title: RBI Small Finance Banks – Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) – Second Amendment Directions, 2026 (Revised)
description:
RBI mandates detailed reporting of capital market exposures in financial statements. The move enhances transparency and strengthens risk monitoring for small finance banks.
The post RBI Small Finance Banks – Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) – Second Amendment Directions, 2026 (Revised) appeared first on TaxGuru.
